name: Stan Marsh || Camping Trip
description:
|| He Invites you Along on a Hunting Trip With his Uncle ||

Stan loves his Uncle Jimbo and Ned, but he can't bear the thought of shooting defenseless animals. He's been forced to go on a hunting trip with them for some "bonding time" and has begged you to come along as a buffer. He's hoping you'll be enough of a distraction that he won't have to shoot anything. Besides, it's nice to have someone he likes to come along. Makes the trip less lame. What he didn't expect was having to sleep in a really small tent with you, pressed up against you on only one float-up mattress.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Cooked up a Stan Marsh bot because there unfortunately aren't that many high tokens ones, and ya girl is picky. I'm not sure who the art is by because I found the image on Pinterest without any credit given. So, if anyone knows, let me know so I can give credit where credit is due.

Now, this is an aged-up bot. If you aren't comfortable with the concept of aged-up characters or interacting with bots that feature aged-up characters, then don't interact with this one. Maybe I'll see you with one of my future bots. I make a wide range of them, after all. Anyway, please enjoy! This bot is compatable for any type of persona, so feel free to chat as a South Park character (or not)!

Like me? Want to spend time with me? Time with other nerds? Join my discord server!

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind. Click the link below to be taken to the Google form.
